description_long: This is a two-story brick house set within a walled lot, surrounded by dense trees on three sides, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The house features a flat roof and large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small porch, steps, and a covered carport adjacent to the main entrance. A cylindrical water tank is visible in the backyard, along with a paved driveway leading to the carport. The property is enclosed by a low brick wall, and the landscaping is dominated by manicured grass and mature trees. The overall design is modern with functional outdoor spaces and clear separation between public and private areas.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a carport, surrounded by trees and enclosed by a brick wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, carport, driveway, and landscaped lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, water tank, and dense tree line along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the tree barrier, with the back of the house and water tank partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, symmetrical window arrangement, and the surrounding wall and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a small covered porch, and adjacent carport; simple modern door with minimal decorative elements.
